examples.eng: He was accused of bigamy.
He was accused of murder.
She was accused of murder.
Smith accused her of lying.
They were accused of heresy.
He was accused of imposture.
They accused him of sacrilege.
He was accused of evading taxes.
examples.ru: Его обвинили в уклонении от налогов.

examples.eng: How dare you accuse me of lying!
examples.ru: Как вы смеете обвинять меня во лжи!

examples.eng: He accused Frank of malingering.
He is accused of raping the girl.
examples.ru: Его обвиняют в изнасиловании этой девушки.

examples.eng: She accused him of being elitist.
He was accused of taking steroids.
He was accused of being a deadbeat.
She was accused of being deceitful.
Are you accusing him of dishonesty?
examples.ru: Вы обвиняете его в мошенничестве /нечестности, недобросовестности/?

examples.eng: She was accused of fabricating data.
He's accused of suborning a witness.
He more or less accused me of lying.
examples.ru: Он почти что обвинил меня во лжи.

examples.eng: He was accused of heading the revolt.
examples.ru: Его обвинили в том, что он возглавлял этот мятеж.

examples.eng: The players were accused of cheating.
He was accused of fomenting violence.
He was accused of sexual indecencies.
examples.ru: Он был обвинен в непристойных приставаниях (досл. непристойном сексуальном поведении).

examples.eng: He was accused of committing perjury.
The company was accused of racial bias.
He was accused of spreading propaganda.
The mayor has been accused of cronyism.
He accused me of not pulling my weight.
examples.ru: Он обвинил меня в том, что я не выполняю свою работу.

examples.eng: She was accused of withholding evidence.
He was accused of prostituting himself.
examples.ru: Его обвинили в том, что он занимался проституцией.
